name: Campfire
compose:
name: slashnode-campfire
services:
  server:
    image: ghcr.io/basecamp/once-campfire:1.4.3
    container_name: campfire-server
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    depends_on:
      - redis
    environment:
      RAILS_ENV: production
      SECRET_KEY_BASE: ${secret.APP_SEED}
      REDIS_URL: redis://campfire-redis:6379
      DISABLE_SSL: 'true'
      VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY: ${VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY:-}
      VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY: ${VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY:-}
      SENTRY_DSN: ${SENTRY_DSN:-}
    volumes:
      - server_data-app:/rails/storage
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8004:80
  redis:
    image: redis:7-alpine
    container_name: campfire-redis
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    command: redis-server --save 60 1 --save 300 10 --save 900 100 --appendonly yes --loglevel warning
    volumes:
      - redis_data-redis:/data
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  server_data-app:
    name: slashnode-campfire_server_data-app
  redis_data-redis:
    name: slashnode-campfire_redis_data-redis
